channel.title: wwdc2020 on Andy Ibanez
channel.description: Recent content in wwdc2020 on Andy Ibanez

item.title: Making Default Web Browsers and E-mail Clients May Not Be Possible For iOS All Devs.
item.description: I hate that my first WWDC article is going to be as lazy as this, but I thought I’d write about it anyway so as to at least give an starting point to devs who will want to try creating their own default web browser or e-mail client on iOS and iPadOS. Please note the vast majority of my thoughts here are based on a very short response I received on the dev forums.
